label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this square dance problem. So, there are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them starts with a partner. The question is about tracking their partner changes through a series of swaps and determining who Bob is with at the end. First, I need to list out the initial pairings. The problem says: - Alice is dancing with Lola - Bob is dancing with Karl - Claire is dancing with Patrick - Dave is dancing with Sam - Eve is dancing with Helga So, let me note these down: Initial partners: Alice ↔ Lola Bob ↔ Karl Claire ↔ Patrick Dave ↔ Sam Eve ↔ Helga Now, the problem describes a series of partner switches. Let me go through each step one by one. First switch: Dave and Alice switch partners. So, Dave was with Sam, and Alice was with Lola. After switching, Dave will be with Lola, and Alice will be with Sam. Let me write that: After first switch: Alice ↔ Sam (previously Dave's partner) Dave ↔ Lola (previously Alice's partner) The others remain the same: Bob ↔ Karl Claire ↔ Patrick Eve ↔ Helga Second switch: Eve and Alice switch partners. So, Eve is currently with Helga, and Alice is with Sam. After switching, Eve will take Alice's partner (Sam), and Alice will take Eve's partner (Helga). After second switch: Alice ↔ Helga Eve ↔ Sam Others remain: Bob ↔ Karl Claire ↔ Patrick Dave ↔ Lola Third switch: Bob and Dave switch partners. Bob is currently with Karl, Dave is with Lola. After switching, Bob will be with Lola, and Dave will be with Karl. After third switch: Bob ↔ Lola Dave ↔ Karl Others remain: Alice ↔
